classes.reasoning: This document is titled 'Foglio informativo e modulo di consenso informato per la partecipazione dei pazienti a un sottostudio facoltativo per la ricerca genetica' (Information sheet and informed consent form for patient participation in an optional genetic research substudy), contains patient consent sections, signature blocks for patient and investigator, and explicitly describes itself as a consent form for a genetic substudy within the main IOV-MEL-202 trial.

trial_title: Studio di fase 2, multicentrico, in aperto su lifileucel (linfociti infiltranti il tumore [TIL]) in partecipanti con melanoma avanzato precedentemente trattato
summary: This is an Italian-language informed consent form (ICF) for an optional genetic research substudy nested within the main IOV-MEL-202 phase 2 trial. The substudy seeks authorization to perform genetic (DNA) testing on tumor and blood samples from participants in the main study of lifileucel (tumor-infiltrating lymphocytes) for advanced melanoma. The document includes detailed information sections explaining the purpose, risks, benefits, data handling, and patient rights, followed by consent signature pages.
references_to: modulo di consenso dello Studio principale
Precision for Medicine GmbH, Barbara-McClintock-Str. 6, 12489 Berlino, Germania
Traduzione finale dall'inglese all'italiano del 22 ottobre 2025
